field.name: client_id
field.description: Google OAuth2 Client ID from Google Cloud Console.

field.name: refresh_token
field.description: OAuth2 Refresh Token obtained during Gmail authorization.

button.description: Click below to authorize and link your real Gmail inbox securely using the API credentials configured in the first tab.

menu.title: Trigger Behavior
menu.info: Demo Mode allows you to test your flows without authenticating or calling real Google APIs. Once Google OAuth is configured, Demo Mode will be bypassed to poll your real inbox.

field.name: simulate_email
field.description: When enabled, the Gmail plugin will generate mock email payloads. If API credentials and OAuth tokens are set, they will override Demo Mode.

field.name: poll_interval
field.description: Determines how frequently the workflow engine checks your Gmail inbox for new emails.

field.name: label_filter
field.description: Specify the Gmail label (e.g. INBOX, UNREAD, STARRED) to watch for new emails.

field.name: default_from
field.description: The simulated sender's email address when Demo Mode is active.

field.name: max_results
field.description: The maximum number of incoming emails to retrieve in a single polling check.
